old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-nskr","title":"SecureDatagramChannel tasks not tracked on close","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/secure.py:288-289

When datagrams arrive, tasks are created but not tracked:
```python
def _on_datagram(self, data: bytes, source: str) -> None:
    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    loop.create_task(self._process_incoming(data, source))
```

If close() is called while tasks are running, they become orphaned and may:
1. Access closed resources
2. Log confusing errors
3. Prevent clean shutdown

Similarly in send_datagram (line 383-384) and _establish_context (line 452).

Fix: Track active tasks and cancel them in close(), or use TaskGroup in Python 3.11+.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:37.37061Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:17:37.370646Z"}
